config.aspect: 9:16 ou 1:1 (para shorts verticais após animação Runway)
config.estilo: photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film, documentary style — sem ilustração, sem fantasy
config.geografia: sempre Moçambique (Makua, Tsonga, Chope, Ndau, Sena), nunca genérico 'África'
config.luz: variar: dawn, golden hour, dusk, firelight, warm indoor, shade — evitar repetição 'warm golden'
config.motion: campo .motion alimenta o Runway image-to-video (espelho do runway-motion-prompts.json para paisagem)

prompts.prompt: Mozambican woman hoeing at dawn, red earth, rows of maize behind, warm golden light, single bead of sweat on temple, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: slow rhythmic hoeing motion, woman bending and rising in steady cadence, dust slowly puffing up from each strike of red earth, golden dawn light gradually warming sky, maize leaves swaying gently in morning breeze, time stretching

prompts.prompt: Elderly Mozambican farmer sowing seeds by hand, bent over furrowed earth, cassava plants nearby, late afternoon light, documentary style, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: hand opening and slowly releasing seeds in patient rhythm, seeds falling softly onto furrowed earth, body bent forward in gentle motion, late afternoon light slowly shifting, cassava leaves swaying in faint breeze

prompts.prompt: Two Mozambican women carrying produce home from the machamba on their heads, dirt path, tall grass either side, warm evening light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: women walking forward with steady balanced pace, baskets on heads barely moving, capulanas swaying with each step, tall grass parting and returning, warm evening light slowly deepening

prompts.prompt: Close-up of African hands pulling green leaves from red earth, soil under fingernails, morning light on skin, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: hands gently pulling green leaves from red earth, soil shifting and falling, fingers carefully selecting, morning light slowly warming on skin, shallow depth of field breathing softly

prompts.prompt: Mozambican fishermen pulling nets at sunrise, Indian Ocean coast, wooden dhow beached, warm orange light, silhouettes against water, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: fishermen pulling heavy net in steady rhythm, water dripping in long slow drops, dhow gently rocking on shore, sunrise light slowly warming sky from coral to gold, silhouettes moving against shimmering water

prompts.prompt: Single Mozambican fisherman checking nets at dawn, standing knee-deep in turquoise shallows, small boat beside him, mist on horizon, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: fisherman slowly lifting wet net out of water, droplets falling in arcs, water rippling around legs, mist on horizon slowly dispersing, calm water reflecting changing dawn light

prompts.prompt: Group of Mozambican fishermen dragging heavy wooden dhow up beach together, sand tracks behind, late afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: team of fishermen heaving heavy dhow up beach, bodies straining in unison and releasing, dhow shifting forward in steady increments, sand tracks lengthening behind, late afternoon light gradually deepening on wood

prompts.prompt: Close-up of Mozambican fisherman hands mending fishing net, wooden boat hull in background, warm coastal light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: hands working needle through net mesh in steady patient rhythm, fingers tying knots precisely, soft coastal light slowly moving across hands, boat hull barely visible in shadow behind

prompts.prompt: Close-up of Mozambican woman hands weaving sisal basket, capulana fabric wrapped around, warm indoor light from doorway, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: hands weaving sisal strands in practiced rhythm, fingers crossing over and under repeatedly, basket slowly rising in form, capulana fabric still and warm, indoor light from doorway slowly shifting

prompts.prompt: Mozambican potter shaping clay vessel on the ground, red earth in hands, village hut behind, late morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: potter's hands shaping wet clay in slow circular motion, vessel walls rising gradually, clay smoothing under wet fingers, dust catching slowly shifting morning light, village hut still in background

prompts.prompt: Elderly Mozambican man carving pau-preto ebony sculpture, wood shavings on ground, concentration on face, natural light from small window, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: carving knife removing wood shavings in steady deliberate strokes, dark curls of ebony falling slowly to ground, sculpture form emerging gradually, light moving slowly across blade and weathered hands

prompts.prompt: Mozambican woman threading colorful missanga beads, bowl of beads in lap, capulana skirt, warm afternoon light on hands, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: needle threading bead after bead in steady rhythm, beads sliding down thread one by one, fingers working precisely, bowl of beads occasionally shifting, afternoon light slowly warming on hands

prompts.prompt: African men playing drums at dusk, Mozambique village circle, firelight on faces, motion blur on hands, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: drummers' hands striking drums in fast rhythmic motion blur, fire flickering and crackling sending sparks upward, faces lit by changing firelight, drum heads vibrating with each strike, dust rising from circle of feet

prompts.prompt: Mozambican drummer hands on timbila xylophone, wooden keys blurred from motion, shadows of dancers around, warm evening light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: wooden mallets striking timbila keys in fast motion blur, dancers moving in shadow around player, evening light slowly fading, hands a blur of rhythm, wooden keys vibrating subtly with each strike

prompts.prompt: Single Mozambican elder playing mbira thumb piano alone, wooden stool, mud wall behind, late afternoon light through open window, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: thumbs plucking mbira keys in delicate intricate rhythm, slow contemplative motion of fingers, late afternoon light through window slowly shifting on face, elder still and centered, faintly nodding to inner pulse

prompts.prompt: Mozambican women in circle clapping and singing around drummer, capulanas in motion, firelight flickering, dust rising from ground, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: women clapping in unison hands rising and falling, capulanas swaying with body motion, drummer's hands blurred at center, fire flickering and casting moving shadows, dust rising in slow puffs from feet

prompts.prompt: Mozambican women dancing in traditional ceremony, colorful capulanas in motion, dust rising from red earth, golden hour light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: women spinning and stepping in dance, colorful capulanas flowing and unfurling in motion, dust rising from red earth in slow puffs, golden hour light moving slowly, ankles flexing rhythmically with each step

prompts.prompt: Mozambican men performing mapiko masked dance, carved wooden masks, drums in background, village night, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: masked dancers moving in deliberate ceremonial pattern, carved masks bobbing with each step, drummers' hands blurred behind, firelight flickering across carved wood faces, ritual gravity in slow movement

prompts.prompt: Chope timbila dance circle, young and old moving together, xylophones on ground, late afternoon warm light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: dancers moving around timbila circle in synchronized step, young and old in unison, xylophone keys shifting gently, late warm light moving slowly across faces, communal pulse visible in shared rhythm

prompts.prompt: Two Mozambican women dancing barefoot on packed earth, arms raised, capulanas spinning, backlit by low sun, silhouette edge light, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: two figures dancing in silhouette, capulanas spinning catching backlight, arms rising and falling slowly, dust drifting around bare feet, low sun creating long shifting shadows

prompts.prompt: Mozambican grandmother teaching granddaughter to hoe machamba, elder hands guiding small hands, warm morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: grandmother's hands guiding child's small hands on hoe, slow rhythmic teaching motion, dust rising from each gentle strike, morning light warming gradually on both faces, intimate connection visible in slight smiles

prompts.prompt: Mozambican children playing improvised drum from tin can, dirt yard, palm trees background, late afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: children striking improvised drum with hands in joyful rhythmic motion blur, dirt yard with palm shadows shifting in breeze, afternoon light slowly moving, occasional laugh visible on faces

prompts.prompt: Young Mozambican girl carrying water on her head from well, dirt path home, golden hour light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: girl walking forward with steady balance, water container barely moving on head, dirt path slowly approaching camera, dust trailing behind feet, golden light slowly warming and deepening

prompts.prompt: Mozambican boy fishing with small homemade rod at rocky shore, concentration on face, warm evening light, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: boy slowly casting line forward, line arcing through air and falling on water, ripples spreading slowly outward, evening light deepening, focused stillness with occasional blink

prompts.prompt: Mozambican market at dawn, women arranging vegetables on capulana cloths, warm orange light filtering through stalls, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: vendor's hands arranging vegetables on cloth in patient rhythm, customers moving past slowly in soft focus, capulanas swaying, sunlight filtering through stalls slowly intensifying from coral to gold

prompts.prompt: Close-up of dried fish stall in Mozambican market, woman vendor in background, morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: hand selecting dried fish, pile shifting slightly with each pick, vendor in soft focus moving slowly in background, morning light slowly brightening across stall

prompts.prompt: Elderly Mozambican herbalist with dried plants and roots arranged before her, wisdom in eyes, natural shade light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: elder's hand gently arranging dried plants in slow deliberate motion, leaves shifting subtly, shade light filtering through and slowly moving, time itself moving slowly around her

prompts.prompt: Mozambican street tailor with old Singer sewing machine, capulana fabric nearby, warm afternoon light from open door, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: Singer machine wheel turning rhythmically, hands guiding fabric forward, capulana sliding under needle in steady motion, afternoon light slowly moving across work surface

prompts.prompt: Elderly Makua man smoking traditional pipe under mafurra tree, wisdom lines on face, soft afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: elder slowly drawing on pipe, smoke rising and curling and dissipating in afternoon light, mafurra leaves swaying gently above casting moving dappled shadows, eyes blinking slowly, time slowing around stillness

prompts.prompt: Mozambican grandmother sitting on low wooden stool by hut entrance, hands folded in lap, late light on her face, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: grandmother sitting still with deep presence, hands resting in lap with occasional gentle adjustment, late afternoon light slowly moving across her face, deep stillness with subtle breathing visible

prompts.prompt: Close-up of weathered Mozambican elder hands, cracked and strong, holding wooden walking stick, soft window light, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: weathered hands gripping wooden cane firmly, slight tremor of age visible, fingers occasionally adjusting grip, soft window light moving slowly across cracked skin, dust catching and drifting

prompts.prompt: Old Mozambican fisherman mending nets alone at dusk, lantern beside him, long shadows, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: elder mending net by lantern light, hands working slowly with thread and needle, lantern flame flickering and casting moving shadows, long shadows shifting gently, dusk slowly deepening into night

prompts.prompt: Interior of Mozambican adobe house at night, oil lamp on wooden table, mother stirring pot over fire, warm orange light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: mother stirring pot in slow circular motion over fire, oil lamp flame flickering on table, smoke rising lazily upward, warm orange light dancing on adobe walls, slow domestic rhythm of evening

prompts.prompt: Palm-thatched hut in village at dawn, smoke rising from cooking fire, warm morning mist, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: smoke rising in slow column from cooking fire, mist slowly dissolving across village, palm thatch swaying lightly in morning breeze, warm dawn light gradually warming and intensifying, awakening rhythm

prompts.prompt: Mozambican woman hanging colorful capulanas to dry on line outside mud-brick house, sun through them, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: colorful capulanas swaying gently on line, sun shining through fabric making shifting patterns of light, woman gently adjusting them then stepping back, light moving slowly through cloth

prompts.prompt: Children's bare feet and mother's feet around cooking fire on earth floor inside hut, warm glow, intimate framing, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: feet of mother and children around fire with occasional shifting of position, fire flickering and crackling sending sparks, warm orange light dancing on bare skin, intimate stillness with breath visible

prompts.prompt: Mozambican grandfather showing small boy how to weave fishing net, wooden pegs, warm afternoon light by hut wall, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: grandfather's hands demonstrating net weaving, boy's small hands attempting to follow, knots forming slowly between them, afternoon light slowly moving across both, patient teaching rhythm

prompts.prompt: Elderly Mozambican woman guiding granddaughter hands shaping clay pot, red earth, focus on connection, documentary style, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: elder hands gently guiding child hands on clay, vessel rising slowly between them, fingers smoothing surface in shared circular motion, both faces concentrated, time suspended in transmission

prompts.prompt: Mozambican father teaching son to hold and cast fishing line, Indian Ocean shore, golden hour, backlit figures, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: father teaching son to cast line, both arms arcing forward in unison, line traveling through air and falling on water, golden hour silhouettes moving slowly, ocean breathing in long swells

prompts.prompt: Mozambican grandmother and grandchild pounding maize in wooden mortar together, red dirt yard, early morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: grandmother and grandchild pounding maize in alternating rhythm, mortars rising and falling, dust drifting up in puffs from each strike, morning light moving slowly across yard

prompts.prompt: Group of Mozambican women pounding maize in tall wooden mortars together, rhythmic motion, dust in warm morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: women pounding maize in synchronized rhythm, mortars rising and falling like heartbeat, dust hanging in warm morning light, bodies moving together in shared cadence, occasional song breath visible

prompts.prompt: Mozambican villagers building palm-thatch roof for new hut, many hands lifting palm fronds together, late afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: many hands lifting palm fronds onto roof in coordinated motion, fronds settling into place, voices calling instruction visible in mouth movement, afternoon light shifting through emerging structure

prompts.prompt: Team of Mozambican fishermen pulling long seine net together onto beach, straining bodies, golden dawn light, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: fishermen pulling seine net in unison, bodies straining backward and releasing forward, net slowly emerging from water heavy with catch, dawn light slowly warming sky and water

prompts.prompt: Mozambican women walking single file back from well with jerrycans of water on their heads, dirt path, warm morning light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: women walking single file with steady balance, jerrycans steady on heads, capulanas swaying with each step, dirt path slowly receding behind, morning light gradually warming the procession

prompts.prompt: Mozambican elder pouring water onto red earth as offering to ancestors, dawn light, hands in gentle motion, intimate framing, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: elder's hand pouring water slowly onto red earth, water absorbing into soil and darkening it, dawn light slowly warming the offering, gentle deliberate motion of giving back

prompts.prompt: Single lit fire at village clearing at dusk, circle of bare feet around it, reverent silence, warm firelight, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: fire crackling and flickering at center sending sparks upward, bare feet of circle visible barely shifting, occasional foot adjusting position, warm firelight dancing on legs and earth, reverent stillness

prompts.prompt: Mozambican curandeiro healer laying hands over small fire with herbs, smoke rising, dim indoor light of traditional hut, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: healer's hands moving slowly over small fire with herbs, smoke rising in spirals upward, herbs gently shifting position over flame, dim warm light glowing softly on face, ritual rhythm in slow gesture

prompts.prompt: Mozambican woman lighting oil lamp at nightfall, cupped hands around flame, warm orange glow on face, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: hands cupping oil lamp flame as it grows, wick catching fire and flame slowly intensifying, warm orange light slowly building on face from below, intimate ignition with held breath

prompts.prompt: Wide shot of Mozambican village at golden hour, cluster of mud-brick and palm-thatch huts, red dirt paths, warm low light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: village in golden hour with smoke rising from huts, figures moving slowly between structures, warm low light slowly deepening from gold to amber, day surrendering to evening, ambient breeze stirring palm thatch

prompts.prompt: Mozambican village square at dusk with baobá tree in center, small fires scattered, people moving between huts, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: small fires flickering across village square, baobá tree still and ancient at center, figures moving slowly between huts, dusk slowly deepening into night, scattered light points emerging

prompts.prompt: Aerial view of Mozambique village surrounded by machambas and dense green, dirt road cutting through, early morning light, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: slow drone flyover village, machambas patchwork rolling beneath in slow parallax, dirt road cutting through frame, morning light slowly warming and revealing detail, expansive scale unfolding

prompts.prompt: Quiet dirt path between village huts in late afternoon, chickens walking, capulanas drying on lines, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: chickens walking and pecking on dirt path, capulanas drying and swaying gently in breeze, occasional figure passing slowly through frame, afternoon light slowly moving across hut walls

prompts.prompt: Mozambican woman washing clothes at riverbank at dawn, reflections in water, mist rising, warm first light, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: woman washing clothes in steady rhythm, water rippling around hands, mist rising and slowly dispersing from river surface, dawn light slowly warming, reflection on water shifting with each movement

prompts.prompt: Silhouette of single Mozambican fisherman with long pole wading into Indian Ocean at sunset, backlit, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: fisherman wading slowly forward into water, long pole arcing forward and lowering, sun slowly setting behind in slow color shift, silhouette barely moving against vast ocean, ocean breathing in long swells

prompts.prompt: Mozambican boy swimming in river surrounded by dense tropical vegetation, ripples on water, golden afternoon light filtering through leaves, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: boy swimming through water in joyful motion, ripples spreading from each stroke, leaves overhead swaying in breeze, dappled light shifting on water surface, splash and laugh visible

prompts.prompt: Mozambican herder with small goat herd walking through tall savanna grass, baobá trees distant, late afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary style
prompts.motion: herder walking forward through tall grass at steady pace, goats following in line, grass parting and swaying, baobás still in distance, late afternoon light slowly moving and warming, vast space breathing

prompts.prompt: Close-up portrait of elderly Mozambican woman with weathered skin and deep lines, traditional capulana headwrap, soft natural window light, direct gaze, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: elder slow blink, gentle breathing visible at chest, light gradually shifting on face revealing details of skin, capulana headwrap still, deep gaze holding the camera with quiet authority

prompts.prompt: Close-up of young Mozambican boy face with bright eyes and small smile, red dust on cheek, late afternoon light, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic
prompts.motion: child's eyes shifting slightly, small smile growing then fading then returning, dust on cheek catching slowly moving afternoon light, breathing visible, occasional blink

prompts.prompt: Portrait of Mozambican drummer mid-performance, sweat on forehead, firelight on features, motion blur around face suggesting rhythm, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: drummer mid-performance with sweat catching firelight, motion blur around hands at edges of frame, face holding focus and rhythm, fire flickering in background sending shifting light, breath rising and falling

prompts.prompt: Close-up portrait of Mozambican fisherman at dawn, weathered face, salt on skin, mist behind, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic, 35mm film
prompts.motion: fisherman's eyes meeting camera then drifting to horizon, breath visible in cool dawn air, mist behind shifting slowly, weathered face still, salt glinting on skin in slowly warming light
